name: Sicilian Sauce (Pdfx51b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy medium saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion, dried basil, and dried oregano.
3. Cook until the onion softens slightly, stirring occasionally, about 6 minutes.
4. Mix in minced garlic and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Add tomato paste and cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Incorporate crushed tomatoes and bring the mixture to a simmer.
7. Simmer until the sauce reaches the desired thickness.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
(Sauce can be prepared ahead. Cover and refrigerate up to 1 week or freeze for up to 1 month.)
